boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment on approved existing bank rail
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Bank rail effective date precedes invoice release; CTL confirms match

critical_features_preserved: bank rail effective date precedes invoice release
final_answer: Source records close the action boundary. CTL confirms bank rail effective date precedes invoice release and matches the exact vendor bank on approved rail. Policy permits execution when current sources close the boundary. Anomaly noise and fallback notes do not override. Action may proceed.
